summary: Made a minimal seam pass by giving chapter 13 a distinct opening construction from chapter 14 and trimming a late repeated temporal scaffold at the handoff into the Vale-house arrival.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to avoid repeating chapter 14's 'By the time Thea...' entry scaffold while preserving the same schoolhouse closure information and tone.
Changed the late 'By the time the Vale yard came into view' sentence to 'Before the Vale yard came into view' to reduce echo across the chapter break.
Checked the style bible for verbatim example-line exclusions; none were present in the chapter text.
